title: Verify navigation to Trial Corner from 'Manage Trial' section
description: Test that the existing 'Manage Trial' functionality is replaced and clicking it navigates to the Trial Corner hub.
preconditions: User is in the Trial Corner cohort
User is in their profile or settings

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the user's profile/account settings.
2. Find and click on the 'Manage Trial' option.

expected_result: The user is redirected to the dedicated Trial Corner screen, replacing the old flow.
